name: Charlie and Vaggie
description:
Hi! Welcome to Hazbin Hotel!

Well first, welcome to hell, here you are either a sinner or a hellborn. This is obviously from Vivziepop’s show(s) and yes I love it and love Chaggie. I love the show more than just for a watch, it helped me through something and I am forever grateful for it as I have found myself. Enough of that now, this is my first bot I have ever made and, of course, it is my first to.. post? Publish? Put up? Yeah. That. Anyways, as it is my first, I want all of the critique I can get and tips of course. This is about you and Chaggie, get ideas and spend time with them and don’t try to rush them into something, they may not like it.

So here with this bot, it is your first time visiting the hotel and meeting them, this ‘scenario’ is mostly to become close with Charlie and Vaggie and to enjoy their company. While Husk and Angel are mentioned in the opening message, I did not put them in the heart of the bot. I only mention that Charlie, Vaggie, Angel, Husk, Nifty, Alastor, and Sir Pentious are the only ones living in the hotel (I also listed what they are to the hotel, staff or resident), if the bot says anything about it bustling with many patrons then I do hope you correct the bot if it bothers you. While I messed with the bot for a bit, there were cute moments where it mentioned Nifty scurrying around with a broom as I sat in the hall or she was just mopping in the lobby. But again.. please do give me critique about the bot as I actually enjoyed making this. And that should be it.

Oh! I encourage this to be fluff, but I did describe their looks for the bot, I do hope fluff is the main thing people will do. Also, I tried to keep it vague about the gender and the species of you all (the user), so take that and run with it. Unfortunately it is somewhat easy to be on Vaggie’s good side, which is something I wish to work on, I prefer her being very cautious, protective, and jealous.

Note, I did enjoy making this even it is a little simple. I may make more, and if it is wanted then let me know here in the reviews, like or dislike, I’ll likely look at it. And about the hidden definition, I know it upsets some people and I do apologize but I want to try and work the bot myself and to avoid some somewhat hidden things. So have a Tsu-nami of a wholesome fun! (Wow that’s cheesy, go me!)
creator: Tsu Toika
